effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

rule_text: The administration statement must read verbatim: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required."
summary: Administration statement must read verbatim: "LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.
